name: Sketch
description: Professional vector design tool for macOS with a JavaScript plugin API, developer handoff mode, and design token export. One of the longest-standing UI/UX design platforms used by professional product teams.

seo.title: Sketch — Design Tools / Design-to-Code
seo.meta_description: Sketch: Professional vector design tool for macOS with a JavaScript plugin API, developer handoff mode, and design token export. One of the longest-standing UI/

when_to_use: macOS UI kit designed with reusable Sketch symbols and libraries
Design tokens exported from Sketch to code via plugin
Developer handoff mode used to extract CSS values from design
JavaScript plugin automating bulk component renaming in Sketch
Legacy design system maintained in Sketch for existing Mac team

pros: Still excellent on Mac with fast, native performance
Mature plugin ecosystem and design token exports
JavaScript plugin API enables deep customization
Pioneered modern UI design tool patterns
cons: Real-time collaboration feels bolted-on vs Figma
Market share has shifted decisively to Figma
Community momentum and plugin updates have slowed
review.verdict: Still a capable Mac-native design tool, but Figma's collaboration and ecosystem make it the safer default in 2026.
review.best_for: Solo designers and small Mac-only teams who prefer native apps over browser tools.
review.not_for: Distributed teams, Windows/Linux users, or orgs standardizing on Figma.
